scripts.build:contract: npm run compact --workspace contract && npm run build --workspace contract
scripts.build: npm run build:contract && npm run build:engine && npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace ui
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace engine && npm run test --workspace contract
scripts.build:start: npm run build --workspace @moonray/ui && npm run start --workspace @moonray/ui
scripts.deploy:vercel: npm run build --workspace @moonray/ui && rm -rf /tmp/moonray-vercel-stage && cp -R ui/dist /tmp/moonray-vercel-stage && cd /tmp/moonray-vercel-stage && npx -y vercel@latest link --yes --project moonray-slicer && npx -y vercel@latest deploy --prod --yes
